prompt:
Use web search to open and inspect this exact Realestate sold listings page: https://www.realestate.com.au/sold/in-mernda,+vic+3754/list-1

Extract every property listing shown on page 1 of that URL. The page normally says "Showing 1 - 25", so your "properties" array must contain 25 rows unless the page itself currently shows fewer.

Important:
- Return the exact page-1 cards in the order they appear.
- Do not return a sample, summary, or older cached subset.
- For "listingUrl", use the individual property detail URL for that exact house/unit/townhouse card, not the sold search results URL.
- If you cannot find an individual property detail URL for a card, leave only that listingUrl field blank and still include the row.
- Keep going until all 25 visible page-1 cards have been captured.

Return only valid JSON with this shape:
{
  "properties": [
    {
      "address": "",
      "propertyType": "",
      "bedrooms": "",
      "bathrooms": "",
      "carSpaces": "",
      "landSize": "",
      "soldDate": "",
      "soldPrice": "",
      "agent": "",
      "listingUrl": "",
      "source": ""
    }
  ],
  "notes": ""
}

Use only information visible on the specified page or the linked listing pages for those same page-1 cards. Leave a field blank when it is not available. Do not invent sold prices, sold dates, or property URLs.
